text.title: value-stream-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for value-stream-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Reporting DORA elite status while omitting Lead Time trend.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A team can achieve DORA elite deployment frequency while customer lead time is stuck flat because the bottleneck has shifted outside the dev process — DORA alone declares victory prematurely.

failure-mode.description: Proposing multiple "primary bottlenecks" in a VSM analysis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Theory of Constraints requires one primary constraint at a time. Multiple primary bottlenecks signals the analysis has not been committed to a definitive finding.

failure-mode.description: Using per-user flow metrics for performance management.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Flow metrics are system-level measures. Individual attribution is both analytically invalid (team dependencies obscure individual contribution) and an HR liability.

failure-mode.description: Running initial VSM workshop without committing to durable data collection.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fishbone-style workshop insights expire. Converting them to durable metrics requires data-engineering work the methodology underestimates; plan it explicitly.

failure-mode.description: Re-baselining metrics after switching vendors without treating it as a definition change.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vendor computation differences create apparent "regressions" that are purely definitional. Pin computation logic in code, not vendor, and treat vendor switch as a definition change event.

failure-mode.description: Agents inventing VSM stage names or metric definitions not in the provided glossary.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs invent plausible stage names like "Strategic Lead Time" that have no agreed definition. Pin a glossary file and require lookups.

failure-mode.description: Aggregating flow metrics across heterogeneous teams without segmentation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mixed-team aggregation hides outliers and makes team-specific bottlenecks invisible. Require segmentation by team or product stream.

failure-mode.description: Agents auto-actioning a bottleneck finding (re-org, hire, deprioritize) without human approval.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bottleneck findings are recommendations, not orders. Auto-actioning organizational changes without sponsor sign-off causes harm and destroys trust.
